productDisplayName: Fossil Women White Dial Chronograph Watch ES2964
description: Case style: Analogue watch, has a circular case with a crystal embellished fixed bezel and a stainless steel backDial style: White dial, has markings, crystal encrusted detail and three handsFeatures: Three-face chronograph display, a screw to reset time, two push buttons to adjust the features, a date apertureStrap style: Magenta leather strap secured with a tang claspWater-resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Fossil collectible tinWarranty: 2 years against manufacturing defects from the date of purchase
